title: Structured Product Data Generator
scenario: Generate a structured product data in CSV format for a product catalog with multiple products. The data should include product ID, name, description, price, and category. The output should be well-formatted and concise, within 250 words. The data should also include a header row with clear column names.
constraints: Must include a header row with clear column names

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated product data adheres to the constraints of word limit and including a header row with clear column names.
Check if the generated CSV syntax is correct and follows standard best practices.
Check if the product data has a clear and organized structure, with clear column names and data types.
